summary: Verified Luna Group venue filtering for /api/events/feed and frontend text readability. All 8 backend tests pass (100%). Backend correctly returns ONLY Luna Group venue events with source='eventfinda_luna_filtered' and luna_venue field. Frontend displays events with readable text using LinearGradient overlays and text shadows.
critical_code_review_comments: Luna venue filtering is working correctly - /api/events/feed returns source='eventfinda_luna_filtered'
All returned events have 'luna_venue' field identifying the Luna Group venue (Eclipse, Su Casa Gold Coast, Juju, Night Market)
Text readability on event cards is good - LinearGradient overlays provide dark background for white text
Text shadows applied to hero card, venue cards, and event titles for contrast enhancement
Events displayed are filtered to Luna Group venues: Eclipse (13 events), Su Casa Gold Coast (13 events), Juju (3 events), Night Market (1 event)

success_rate.frontend: 100% (UI verified - text readable on all card types)

seed_data_creation: None - events fetched from Eventfinda API with Luna venue filtering
context_for_next_testing_agent: Luna venue filtering verified and working. The /api/events/feed endpoint now returns ONLY events at Luna Group venues (Eclipse, After Dark, Su Casa Brisbane, Su Casa Gold Coast, Juju, Night Market, Ember & Ash). Response includes 'source': 'eventfinda_luna_filtered' to indicate filtering is active, and each event has a 'luna_venue' field. Frontend text readability is good with LinearGradient overlays on hero cards, venue cards, and trending cards.

luna_venue_field.description: All events have 'luna_venue' field set to Luna Group venue name

text_contrast.notes: All text has sufficient contrast with backgrounds due to LinearGradient overlays and textShadow styles
